formInstance.inputDocument:
Dear [Professional Association],

I am writing to apply for membership as a Corporate Member of your esteemed organization. My name is Avery Martinez, and I am currently employed as a Marketing Coordinator at Marketing Solutions with four years of experience in the marketing industry.

I hold a Bachelor's Degree in Business Administration, which has equipped me with the necessary skills and knowledge to excel in my role. Despite not holding any professional certifications at the moment, I am committed to continuous learning and professional development to enhance my abilities.

I am interested in becoming a member of your association to network with industry professionals, access valuable resources and tools, and stay updated on the latest trends and developments in the field. As a Corporate Member, I believe I can contribute to the association through my experience and insights.

I have chosen the 2-year membership duration to demonstrate my commitment to being an active and engaged member of the association. Tom Anderson, my colleague at Marketing Solutions, can attest to my dedication and passion for the marketing industry. Please feel free to reach out to him at tom.anderson@hotmail.com for a reference.

I am excited about the opportunity to join your association and contribute to its community. Thank you for considering my application. I look forward to the possibility of becoming a valued member of your organization.

Warm regards,

Avery Martinez
avery.martinez@hotmail.com
555-6783
Date of Birth: 1989/11/20
Education: Bachelor's Degree in Business Administration
Current Employer: Marketing Solutions
Job Title: Marketing Coordinator
Years of Experience: 4

[Application Attachment: Reference from Tom Anderson]
